docs.text: Awesome Tools A curated list of awesome tools for dev, design, and life. Inspired by awesome-python . Awesome Tools Language German Grammar Checker Korean Ancient Greek Latin Hans Ørberg's Lingua Latina per se illustrata series Old Persian Design Figma Branding Machine Learning Open Training Data Llama Awesome Papers on Natural Language Processing (NLP) Knowledge Graph LaTeX Software Architecture Frontend Dev UI Performance Mock Backend Backend Dev IntelliJ Java GraphQL Database Database Management DevOps OpenStack Miscellaneous Contributing License Language Duolingo German Fraktur Typeface Cheatsheet Grammar Checker Duden Mentor LanguageTool QuillBot rechtschreibpruefung24.de Sapling Korean Papago - The best Korean dictionary. Make sure to download their mobile APP 延世大学韩国语教材全套(1-6册) 李思皎韩语 Ancient Greek Ancient Greek Language resources on Reddit Resources on Learning Ancient Greek from LSJ Latin Hans Ørberg's Lingua Latina per se illustrata series Lingua Latina: Colloquia Personarum audios Lingua Latina: Pars I: Familia Romana audios Old Persian Achaemenid Royal Inscriptions Old Persian Fonts on FontSpace Old Persian Fonts, Esnaashari & Sarhadi's Old Persian Unicode Font (Zip) Old Persian Fonts TITUS Old Persian Corpus Design Vectorian ornaments SVG/LOGO Brandfetch SVG Repo Worldvectorlogo API Stylebook Design Guidelines Ubuntu Design Tiger I Tanks 3D Printing Cults Thingiverse Lego Pieces 3D Printing GrabCAD GrabCAD Panzer VI Tiger 1:35 Panzer VI Tiger E solidworks step Panzerkampfwagen Tiger Tank Tiger 1 (Toy) Tiger 1 Tiger Tank Figma Select Similar - Completely screwed on a file after duplicating 300 objects? Instead of going one by one this plugin single handedly came in clutch. Branding Docker Elastic Brand Guide Golang GraphQL HashiCorp Jupyter TypeScript Machine Learning Deep Learning Tutorial Reinforcement Learning: An Introduction by Sutton and Barto - is the introductory book on RL. It covers very basics and build up from there. Does not cover deep RL. Open Training Data When we are learning about Machine Learning it is best to actually experiment with real-world data, not just artificial datasets. Fortunately, there are thousands of open datasets to choose from, ranging across all sorts of domains. Here are a few places we can look to get data: Amazon's AWS datasets AWS Data Exchange Data Portals - A Comprehensive List of Open Data Portals from Around the World Datasets subreddit Kaggle datasets Knowledge Graph entities Nasdaq Data Link OpenConcepts - Entity API Project Gutenberg - Free books for read and data analytics UC Irvine Machine Learning Repository University of Oregon RouteViews Project University of Oregon RouteViews Project Wikipedia's list of Machine Learning datasets WikiSQL - NL to SQL Llama Downloading converted and quantized Llama models LLaMA 2 13B base LLaMA 2 13B chat LLaMA 2 70B base LLaMA 2 70B chat LLaMA 2 7B base LLaMA 2 7B chat A comprehensive guide to running Llama 2 locally Downloading Llama models llama-2-7b-hf - Converted model weights for Llama-2-7B in Huggingface format Ollama Awesome Papers on Natural Language Processing (NLP) Attention is All you Need Knowledge Graph arrows.app Neo4j Desktop Graph Apps Gallery - Plugin apps for Neo4j Desktop that provide new capabilities, like Monitoring, Import, Analysis, Running Graph Algorithms, Visualization and much more LaTeX Cool Text Highlighting in LaTeX CTAN - The "Maven Central" for LaTeX LaTeX math equation online editor LaTeX showcase MacTeX - LaTeX comes with various installation packges, some are minimized versions. The comprehensive package is MacTeX QuickLaTeX.com - Instant math equation syntax checker and sharing via image online texlive package manager - Installing a LaTeX package. e.g. sudo tlmgr update --self && sudo tlmgr install pgfornament Software Architecture Software architecture tools UML Boundary Object v.s. Control Object Frontend Dev Defensive CSS Nodesource - Universal node & npm installer npm trends The Modern JavaScript Tutorial UI Performance Lighthouse CI Action - Maintained by third party, no GitHub App install required, no dedicated UI report hosting server required Lighthouse CI - Maintained by Google, GitHub App install required, UI report hosting requires dedicated server Lighthouse PageSpeed Insights Performance Budget Calculator Request Map Generator Third Party Web Mock Backend json-graphql-server json-server - Quick back-end for prototyping and mocking lowdb - Simple to use type-safe local JSON database Backend Dev API Platform (also checkout this interesting startup ) Cloudcraft - Visualize cloud architecture like a Pro by creating smart AWS diagrams Generate SQL DB Schema Diagram get.docker.com - Installing Docker on Linux with an automated script JSON to JSON Schema converter online IntelliJ Intellij Ubuntu Light Theme - an Idea theme plugin whose color scheme follows the famous Ubuntu Color Palette String Manipulation plugin - With a simple Alt / Option + M you get case switching, sorting, filtering, incrementing, aligning to columns, grepping, escaping, encoding, and more Java Defensive Copy Java Decompiler Java Generics FAQs jConsole Learning Java via Jenkov VisualVM Diagnostic Tools The jhat Utility The jinfo Utility The jmap Utility The jps Utility The jstack Utility The jstat Utility GraphQL gqt - Build and execute GraphQL queries in the terminal GraphiQL online Database MySQL Tutorial Oracle Tutorial Postgres.app - The easiest way to get started with PostgreSQL on Mac Database Management DBeaver pgAdmin (PostgreSQL) pgweb (PostgreSQL) DevOps Docker Registry UI Go Playground OpenStack Swift Docker Miscellaneous command-not-found.com - Dealing with "command not found" Error Convert curl command to programming language code Convert JSON to YAML Discourse - A platform for community discussion. Free, open, simple. Escape/Unescape Tool git-crypt Greasy Fork - A nice browser per-website customization such as de-流氓 script by Bilibili local-jwks-server - a tool for mocking JWT authentication with JWKS martinfowler.com Online JSON formatter Online Self-Signed SSL Certificate Generator Tool for Website OpenID Connect explained Random String Generator Refactoring.Guru smee.io - Receives payloads then sends them to your locally running application Tree : An online tree-like utility for generating ASCII folder structure diagrams. Written in TypeScript and React. Unix Time Stamp - Epoch Converter URL Decoder/Encoder whatismyip.com Contributing Your contributions are always welcome! Please take a look at the contribution guidelines first. I will keep some pull requests open if I'm not sure whether those libraries are awesome, you could vote for them by adding :+1: to them. Pull requests will be merged when their votes reach 20 . License The use and distribution terms for awesome-tools are covered by the Apache License, Version 2.0 . If you have any question about this opinionated list, do not hesitate to contact me or open an issue on GitHub.
